notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Salvador Perez. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adam Frazier pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adam Frazier strikes out on a foul tip.
